message:
test: expand IFC conformance corpus with additional exfiltration and transplanted test vectors

Adds new IFC conformance test fixtures and expected outputs:
- benign_allow, declassify_receipt, exfil_block expected results
- Covert, implicit, indirect, and temporal exfiltration scenarios
- Transplanted conformance tests: closure capture, destructuring binding,
  iterator protocol with fixtures and expected outputs
- Updates existing IFC corpus fixtures and conformance assets

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1 @@
+{"donor_harness":"franken-ifc","source":"secret = fs.read('/creds'); x = secret; y = x; net.send(y)","observed_output":"outcome:block evidence:flow_violation evidence_id:fv-indirect"}

@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+TypeError|Cannot read property 'prop' of null
+ReferenceError|undeclared is not defined
+props:
